meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't collaborate (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Collaboration Issues
content.seo_description: Learn to implement seamless user onboarding to fix collaboration blockers. A beginner-friendly guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Collaboration fails when users don't understand how to interact with your app. By implementing a structured user onboarding flow, you guide users through core features, reducing friction and ensuring they can invite teammates, share workspaces, and contribute effectively from the moment they sign up.
content.intro:
You have built a functional app, but your users are hitting a wall. They log in, stare at a blank dashboard, and abandon the project because they don't know how to invite peers or start a shared task. The silence in your collaboration hub isn't a technical bug; it is a design failure in your onboarding journey.

Great developers don't just write code; they design the first five minutes of the user experience. By mastering onboarding, you transform a confusing interface into an intuitive workspace. This checklist will guide you through building a high-conversion walkthrough that turns passive visitors into active collaborators.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the specific action that proves a user understands collaboration, such as sending their first invite. Focus the onboarding flow entirely on this single milestone.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user journey map for a collaborative SaaS that highlights the 'Aha!' moment of inviting a teammate. Output a JSON structure for an onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding state machine logic in typescript'

steps.title: Implement Progress Indicators
steps.description: Users need to know how much effort is required. Adding a progress bar reduces drop-off rates by providing a clear sense of completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a progress stepper that tracks three distinct onboarding steps: Profile Setup, Invite Teammate, and First Action.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add progress-stepper component to the dashboard layout'

steps.title: Build Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Don't overwhelm users with documentation. Use contextual pointers to explain specific collaboration buttons only when they are relevant.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a CSS-in-JS tooltip helper that anchors to any DOM element ID and triggers on the first site visit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement react-joyride for contextual onboarding tooltips'

steps.title: Automate Invite Triggers
steps.description: Create a modal that appears immediately after the first project is created, prompting the user to bring in their collaborators.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modal component that triggers after the project creation API call succeeds, focusing on inviting a collaborator by email.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create invite-modal component with email validation logic'

steps.title: Analyze Drop-off Points
steps.description: Add simple logging to see where users close the onboarding flow. This data allows you to iterate and improve the experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an analytics tracker function that sends events to a mock API whenever a user skips an onboarding step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'integrate simple analytics tracking into onboarding steps'

pro_tips: Never force a login before showing the value of the collaboration feature.
Use 'empty states' as an opportunity to teach, not just to display a blank screen.
Keep your onboarding flow under three steps; cognitive load is the enemy of conversion.
Personalize the experience by using the user's name in the first tooltip or welcome modal.
Always provide a 'Skip' button; power users will get frustrated if they cannot bypass the tutorial.
resources: UX Design Patterns for Onboarding: https://www.nngroup.com
content.next_steps: Once you have your onboarding flow live, deploy it to a staging environment and watch a friend attempt to sign up without your help. Refine the flow based on where they get stuck.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn your app into a collaborative powerhouse. Stop letting users drift away and start building experiences that stick. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
